ogTitle: Carbunup River vs Cardup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carbunup River and Cardup.
heading: Carbunup River vs Cardup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carbunup River, Western Australia and Cardup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carbunup River has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Cardup (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carbunup River or Cardup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carbunup River has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Cardup scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carbunup River scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Cardup scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carbunup River or Cardup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carbunup River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
